title: MysticMC Auction Tracker
description: Tracks prices from the auction house in a tooltip and graph.
body:
For use on the [MysticMC Minecraft Server](https://mysticmc.co/):

MysticMC Auction House Tracker is a client-side Fabric mod that watches auction listings you open, stores their prices, and shows that history back to you in tooltips and a graph.

**How to use it:**

- Join the server and enter a realm like Arcane, Cosmic, or Elysium.
- Open the auction house, navigate to each page, letting the page sit briefly until all listings on that page is scanned.
- Hover an item in the auction house to see tracker info in the tooltip.
- Press H while hovering an item in the auction house to open its price graph.
- Press O from a handled inventory screen to export tracked history to CSV.

Added the following commands: 
- /mysticahtracker website 
- /mysticahtracker site 
- /mysticahtracker tooltips off 
- /mysticahtracker tooltips on 
- /mysticahtracker tooltips toggle 
- /mysticahtracker tooltips status

Add a website to better visualize item prices. https://mystic-price-tracker.onrender.com

**What it shows:**

tooltip: active realm, 30d Lowest each, 30d Highest each, and Item last seen in AH
graph: the hovered item’s per-item price history for the last 30 days in the current realm only

**A couple important details:**

Data is separated by realm, so Arcane prices won’t mix with Cosmic or Elysium
